events.title: MV Hondius departs Ushuaia
events.description: 147 passengers and crew begin a South Atlantic wildlife expedition.

events.title: Index case dies onboard
events.description: Dutch national dies. Remains held in Saint Helena pending repatriation.

events.title: Dutch woman dies — Johannesburg
events.description: Close contact of index case collapses on Airlink flight. WHO traces 82 passengers and 6 crew.

events.title: WHO notified — PCR confirmed
events.description: NICD South Africa confirms hantavirus via PCR. British national in ICU Johannesburg.

events.title: Third death — German national
events.description: German passenger dies on board. Ship anchors off Praia, Cape Verde.

events.title: CDC activates EOC Level 3
events.description: Two labs independently confirm Andes virus.

events.title: WHO Director-General travels to Tenerife
events.description: Suspected 9th case tests negative; cluster stays at 8.

events.title: MV Hondius docks at Tenerife
events.description: Disembarkation begins at Granadilla port. First repatriation flight departs for Madrid.

events.title: French and American passengers test positive
events.description: Cluster rises to 10 cases. French passenger deteriorates in Paris; 17 Americans evaluated at UNMC National Quarantine Unit in Omaha. WHO formalises 42-day monitoring recommendation.
